title: Convo
description: Convo brings dynamic conversations and world events into Minecraft.
body:
# Convo

Convo is a Minecraft mod that introduces a unique conversation mechanic between Villagers and Pillagers, adding a new layer of immersion and challenge to your game. Prepare yourself for unexpected encounters, strategic dialogue, and intense situations where your words may either lead to peace or combat!

With unique zoom function to pull you closer to the conversation, world spawn events and conversational options to gain allies and enemies. This mod is set out to create a true NPC rich world in Minecraft.

## 📜 Features

- **Pillager Event Mechanic**  
  Every 10 minutes, there's a **50% chance** that a group of Pillagers will spawn nearby, starting a **conversation event**. During this event, you must engage in dialogue with the Pillagers. If you fail to handle the conversation wisely, they will attack! Choose your words carefully and try to prevent conflict.

![Pillager Event](https://i.imgur.com/mnEQFq6.gif)

- **New Conversation System**  
  Interact with both Villagers and Pillagers in entirely new ways. The conversation system allows for unique, branching dialogues with multiple outcomes depending on your choices. Make friends, avoid battles, or accidentally incite them—it's all up to you!

![Convo Gif](https://s12.gifyu.com/images/SopA5.gif)

## 🛠️ Upcoming Features

- **Quests**  
  Soon you'll be able to embark on quests from conversations with both Villagers and Pillagers. Complete tasks, forge alliances, or enter dangerous negotiations that affect your world.

- **Smoother Screen Transition**  
  An update to enhance the conversation experience by refining the screen transitions during dialogue for a more immersive and seamless flow.

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the latest release of the Convo mod from the Modrinth page.
2. Place the `.jar` file into your Minecraft `mods` folder.
3. Start your game and enjoy the dynamic new conversation system with Villagers and Pillagers!

## 🔧 Compatibility

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.20.1
- **Modloaders Supported**: Fabric

---

## 📝 Feedback & Support

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Feel free to join our community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/HrSU3t4wwF) for direct support!

---

**Convo Mod** © 2024. Made with ❤️ by Trep. Happy chatting, and watch out for those Pillagers!
